arts.ttl: Ademola Lookman: Ranking the SEVEN Premier League clubs that want Africa’s best player
arts.sum: Lookman, who is the reigning African Footballer of the Year, is wanted by no fewer than seven Premier League clubs, according to Caught Offside, which reports that Arsenal, Liverpool, Manchester United and Chelsea are all vying to sign the forward. Using SciSports’ Career Advice tool, which analyses the suitability of clubs based upon factors ranging from playing time and potential development to style and formation, FootballTransfers has provided a rundown of his options from the worst to the best based purely on how well he is likely to perform.

arts.ttl: Monday's Transfer Talk Update: Ademola Lookman, Brian Brobbey, Rasmus Hojlund

arts.ttl: Preview: Nigeria vs. Zimbabwe - prediction, team news, lineups

arts.ttl: Report: Man United’s Victor Osimhen deal could be in jeopardy
arts.sum: Manchester United’s plan to sign Victor Osimhen this summer might be in serious jeopardy—and it’s all because of Rasmus Hojlund. Despite a hugely underwhelming season, where the Danish striker endured a painful goal drought, reports suggest he’s actually more likely to stay at Old Trafford than leave.
